## Safety Impact

- [ ] Keeps BrewMatch read-only.
- [ ] Does not install, delete, move, adopt, or modify applications.
- [ ] Adds no telemetry, credentials, or secrets.

## Validation

- [ ] `swift package describe`
- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`

Add screenshots or terminal output if user-facing output changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] README/CHANGELOG updated when needed.
- [ ] Matching changes include sanitized examples.
